name: TestFlight & Play Submit
description: Runs local EAS builds for Expo apps and submits artifacts non-interactively to TestFlight (iOS) or Google Play (Android), with profile-aware build numbers, eas.json pre-flight checks, and separate build-then-submit steps.
author: Ken Stark

name: WordPress Block Scaffolder
description: Scaffold a WordPress block from a Figma design, building ACF fields, PHP templates, SCSS, and optional React components following strict project conventions.
author: Ken Stark
